slide1.title: Agentic Commerce
slide1.subtitle: Protocol-Driven Cross-Border Logistics
slide1.description: AI-Native Global Logistics — Defining the Standard for Agent-Driven Economy

slide2.title: Traditional Logistics is
slide2.subtitle: Scattered providers, hidden costs, language barriers, and byzantine paperwork — a minefield for the unprepared.

painPoints.title: Fragmented Ecosystem
painPoints.description: Freight, customs, warehousing, insurance — each requires a separate vendor, portal, and contract. No single source of truth.
details: Separate accounts for freight, customs broker, warehouse, and insurance
No unified tracking — must log into 5+ portals per shipment
Vendor lock-in with incompatible data formats

painPoints.title: Opaque & Inflated Fees
painPoints.description: Surcharges, fuel adjustments, currency markups — actual cost is buried under layers of opaque fee structures with no transparent breakdown.
details: Fuel surcharges adjusted weekly without notification
Currency conversion markups of 2-4% hidden in exchange rates
Terminal handling charges vary 3x between providers
No standardized fee breakdown — impossible to compare quotes

painPoints.title: Language & Timezone Gaps
painPoints.description: Customer support across time zones means 8-16 hour response lags. Language misunderstandings lead to wrong classifications and shipment errors.
details: Support teams in different time zones cause 8-16h response delays
Language misunderstandings lead to incorrect HS code classifications
Urgent issues during non-business hours go unresolved for days
Translation errors in commercial documents trigger customs holds

painPoints.title: Documentation Maze
painPoints.description: Bills of lading, certificates of origin, commercial invoices, packing lists — each route and country demands unique forms. Customization is near impossible.
details: 30+ document types across a single multi-country shipment
Each country requires unique form formats and certifications
Halal, phytosanitary, and safety certificates all have different workflows
Template customization requires expensive legal consultation

painPoints.title: Expert Knowledge Required
painPoints.description: Without deep domain expertise, shippers face mis-classified HS codes, compliance penalties, detained cargo, and under-insured shipments.
details: HS code mis-classification leads to 5-20% duty overpayment or penalties
Sanctions screening failures can result in cargo seizure
Under-insured shipments expose shippers to total loss risk
Regulatory changes across 190+ countries are impossible to track manually

slide2.warningStrip: Without professional expertise, every shipment carries hidden risk

slide4.title: MCP-Powered
slide4.subtitle: Wrap logistics APIs into AI-understandable tools. Any LLM can ship goods in 500ms.

slide5.title: Digital Currency
slide5.subtitle: Faster, cheaper, borderless — the future of B2B transactions powered by blockchain.

advantages.title: Instant Settlement
advantages.detail: Cryptocurrency transactions settle in seconds, not the 3-5 business days typical of traditional banking. This dramatically improves cash flow and reduces counterparty risk in supply chain operations.

advantages.title: Ultra-Low Fees
advantages.detail: Transaction fees on modern L2 networks cost fractions of a cent, compared to 2-3% credit card processing fees or $25-50 wire transfer charges. For high-volume B2B payments, this translates to massive savings.

advantages.title: Borderless Transfers
advantages.detail: Send payments to any country without currency conversion fees, correspondent banking delays, or SWIFT overhead. Stablecoins like USDC maintain dollar value while moving freely across borders.

advantages.title: Programmable Logic
advantages.detail: Embed payment conditions directly in code: escrow releases, milestone-based payments, automated royalties, and conditional settlements — all without manual intervention or third-party arbitration.

advantages.title: Full Transparency
advantages.detail: Every transaction is permanently recorded on-chain, providing immutable proof of payment. This eliminates disputes, simplifies reconciliation, and satisfies compliance requirements automatically.

advantages.title: Always Available
advantages.detail: No business hours. No bank holidays. No weekend delays. Cryptocurrency networks operate continuously, enabling true real-time global commerce around the clock.

advantages.title: AI-Native Payments
advantages.detail: In the AI era, autonomous agents need to transact without human intervention. Cryptocurrency is the ideal fit: APIs can sign transactions programmatically, smart contracts enforce trust without middlemen, and decentralized settlement removes single points of failure. Unlike traditional banking — with its KYC friction, business-hour limits, and centralized gatekeepers — crypto enables AI agents to autonomously negotiate, pay, and receive funds 24/7 with cryptographic security, micro-cent precision, and zero counterparty risk.

x402.title: X402 Protocol
x402.detail: X402 extends the HTTP 402 status code to enable machine-to-machine payments at the protocol level. AI agents and services can autonomously negotiate and settle payments using USDC on Base L2 — no API keys, no intermediaries, just cryptographic proof of payment embedded in HTTP headers.

slide6.title: Global Routes,
slide6.subtitle: Automated customs clearance across 4 major trade regions, cutting clearance time by 60-75%.

phases.title: Self-Operated Corridor

phases.title: 3PL Marketplace
